creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
(In reply to Vincent Bentley from comment #3)
What say pkg info -r heimdal.

I guess you habe installed git. Git has a depeney p5-GSSAPI. You have to change the options in p5-GSSAPi. 

May be, you have to change more options in several ports, depends on the output of pkg info -r heindal.
